$comment: 英文雙語版 overlay（deck 專屬、不上網頁；Hub 課程頁是純中文）。依 decisions.md 第六節 overlay 原則，英文內容不進 Hub course.json，放這裡。鍵對齊 course.json 結構：每個中文欄位配一個 en 值。generate_deck.py --lang bilingual --overlay <本檔> 消費。內容 1:1 抽自 v1 _v1歸檔-course-intro-deck/build/generate_aa_en.py（AA 雙語版，唯讀）。只 AA、AB 純中文不做。

cover.promise: From sharper questions and real verification, to building a complete workflow with AI
cover.chipsZh: 問得出來 · 查得到底 · 做得出東西

about.subtitleZh: 專案助理教授・國立東華大學 通識教育中心
about.promiseZh: 我會帶你把 AI 用在真實任務，而不只看工具展示。

office.blueprintEn: Science & Engineering Building II, Room C306
office.blueprintNote: 【Office floor plan — TBA before semester 研究室平面圖・開學前補】

slido1.titleEnHtml:
Grab your phone—
let's meet you first
slido1.titleZh: 拿出手機，先認識一下你
slido1.subEn: Scan the QR to join　slido.com　·　#
slido1.noteEn: Coming up: what AI feels like to you, your department, and which AI tools you've tried.
slido1.noteZh: 等等問你：你心中的 AI 像什麼、你來自哪個系、用過哪些 AI 工具

phases.titleZh: 這門課在學什麼：三部曲
phases.noteEnHtml: At the core: AI literacy—we don't start from coding, so non-CS students keep up.
phases.noteZh: 核心是 AI 素養（AI literacy）——不從寫程式開始，非資訊背景也跟得上

items.bodyEn: Ask good questions, break tasks down, verify answers; run one full cycle on Teachable Machine—data → label → train → test → improve.
items.bodyZh: 問對問題、拆解任務、查證答案；用 Teachable Machine 走一次「資料→標記→訓練→測試→改進」。

items.headZh: 任務型 AI 工具與 Agent
items.bodyEn: AI search & research, AI slide-making, music and media generation, and emerging agentic tools.
items.bodyZh: AI 搜尋研究、AI 簡報、音樂與多媒體生成、新興 agentic 工具。

items.headZh: 桌面 AI 與專業工作流
items.bodyEn: AI on local files, less copy-paste; command-line automation that non-CS folks can pick up too.
items.bodyZh: AI 處理本機資料、減少重複貼上；非資訊背景也能上手的 command-line 自動化。

destination.titleEnHtml:
Where this course leads:
build your own AI workflow
destination.titleZh: 這門課的終點：做出你的 AI 工作流
destination.subEn: Not memorizing tool names—turning a real problem into work you can explain, verify, and show.
destination.subZh: 不是背工具名稱，而是把一個真實問題，變成能說明、能查證、能展示的作品。

weeks.legendEn: ●=weekly topic　●=midterm/final milestone　·　bands=the three parts　｜　每週主題・里程碑・三部曲分段

grading.noteEnHtml: Final = an AI workflow project: combine at least two kinds of AI tools, and explain your process, verification, and reflection. The final isn't a tool-name quiz—it's showing how you solve a task with AI.
grading.noteZh: 期末＝AI 工作流專題：至少整合兩類 AI 工具，說明過程、查證與反思。期末不是考工具名稱，是展示你怎麼用 AI 解決任務。

help.titleEn: Stuck? Here's how to reach me
help.noteEn: On Slido you can ask without raising your hand.　上 Slido，問問題不用舉手。

items.en: Use your school Office 365 account (activate NDHU Office 365 first)
items.zh: 用學校 Office 365 帳號（先啟用國立東華大學 Office 365）
建議安裝 Teams 桌面版

tools.titleZh: 課堂會親手用到的工具
tools.noteEnHtml: Tools change, skills don't. We'll use the best equivalent that week.　工具會換、能力不換。

daily.titleZh: 日常 AI 工具推薦
daily.noteEnHtml: Week 1, just pick one that fits you—no need to install them all.　第一週先挑一個順手的就好。

items.enHtml: Some tools need a free account
items.zh: 部分工具需註冊免費帳號

items.enHtml: Room E403—seats near outlets go first-come
items.zh: 教室 理工二館 E403——有插座的位子先到先選

rules.titleEn: How we use AI in this course
rules.titleZh: 這門課的 AI 使用守則
rules.subEn: You may learn and create with AI—but you must:
rules.subZh: 可以用 AI 學習與創作，但你要——

items.bodyEn: Be able to say how you asked, how you revised, and why you decided that way.
items.bodyZh: 說得出你怎麼問、怎麼改、為什麼這樣決定。

items.headZh: 會查證 AI 的輸出
items.bodyEn: AI gets things wrong and makes things up; check before you hand it in.
items.bodyZh: AI 會錯也會編；交出去前你要查過。
遵守誠信、隱私與著作權。

slido2.titleEnHtml:
Last thing—
tell me what you hope for
slido2.noteEnHtml: Why you're taking this, what you most want AI to help you do, and one word for your hopes.
slido2.noteZh: 修課動機、你最想用 AI 幫你完成什麼事、一個詞形容你的期待

finale.titleZh: 歡迎來到人工智慧概論
finale.nextWeekEn: Next week: Web AI—how to ask questions and plan a task.
finale.nextWeekZh: 下週預告：Web AI——怎麼問問題、怎麼規劃任務
finale.actionEn: Your small task: bring one problem you'd like to solve with AI.
finale.actionZh: 下週的小任務：帶一個你想用 AI 解決的問題來
